title: Accumulating Record
description: Base schema for Archeia accumulating records — append-only artifacts (ADRs, retros, experiment outcomes) that stay on disk forever and are never pruned.

owner.description: The domain owner that wrote this record.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the record was written.

author.description: Who (human or agent identifier) authored this record.

status.description: Current relevance of the record. The only permitted frontmatter mutation on an existing record is changing status from 'active' to 'superseded' when a successor is written.

supersedes.description: Relative path to the predecessor record, if this record supersedes an earlier one.

superseded_by.description: Relative path to the successor record, if this record has been superseded.
